howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.description: Sharing a heartfelt message is easy. Get started in just a few minutes:
howItWorks.features:
• Install the app: download Mesaje din Suflet for free from the App Store or Google Play.
  • Browse greetings: explore hundreds of beautiful messages for every occasion.
  • Personalize: add your own touch to make the message truly yours.
  • Send with love: share directly with your loved ones in seconds.
